inputs.name: required_labels_any
inputs.description: Comma-separated list of labels where at least one must be present.

inputs.default: Select at least one label to categorize this PR.
inputs.description: Error message shown when no required label is present.

inputs.name: runs-on
inputs.description: GitHub runner to use for this workflow.

inputs.name: target
inputs.description: Publish target: node | rust-crate | helm-chart

inputs.name: source
inputs.description: Path to the source directory.

inputs.name: registry
inputs.description: Registry URL. Defaults: node → https://registry.npmjs.org, rust-crate → crates.io, helm-chart → oci://registry-1.docker.io/helm-charts

inputs.name: chart
inputs.description: Path to the Helm chart directory (helm-chart target only).

inputs.name: tag
inputs.description: npm dist-tag (node target only, e.g. latest, next, beta).

inputs.name: version
inputs.description: Version override (must match version in manifest).

inputs.name: publish
inputs.description: Whether to publish after packaging. Set false for build/package-only tests.

inputs.name: runs-on
inputs.description: GitHub runner label.

secrets.name: NPM_TOKEN
secrets.description: Token with publish access to the npm registry (node target).

secrets.name: CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN
secrets.description: Token with publish access to the Cargo registry (rust-crate target).

secrets.name: HELM_USERNAME
secrets.description: Username for the Helm OCI registry (helm-chart target).

secrets.name: HELM_PASSWORD
secrets.description: Password for the Helm OCI registry (helm-chart target).

secrets.name: DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL
secrets.description: Discord webhook URL for publish notifications.

compositeActions.name: Dagger Run
compositeActions.description: Warms the Dagger engine and executes a Dagger module function call.

inputs.name: call
inputs.description: Dagger function call string (e.g. 'rust-build-and-test --source=.')

inputs.name: module
inputs.description: Dagger module reference

inputs.name: cloud-token
inputs.description: Dagger Cloud token for caching

inputs.name: dagger-version
inputs.description: Dagger CLI version to execute

inputs.name: engine-version
inputs.description: Dagger engine image version to prewarm

outputs.name: stdout
outputs.description: Standard output from the Dagger function call

compositeActions.name: Discord Notify
compositeActions.description: Sends a CI status notification to a Discord webhook.

inputs.name: webhook-url
inputs.description: Discord webhook URL. Skipped silently if empty.

inputs.name: status
inputs.description: Job status: success, failure, or cancelled.

inputs.name: workflow
inputs.description: Workflow name shown in the embed title.

inputs.name: run-url
inputs.description: URL to the GitHub Actions run.

inputs.name: ref
inputs.description: Branch or tag ref.
